feature_title: Kima Hub Upstream — Deferred: Swagger Removal (KH-19)

companion_files.name: PLAN.md
companion_files.content:
# Kima Hub Upstream — Deferred: Swagger Removal (KH-19)

## Document Status
- Last updated: 2026-03-02
- Feature: Swagger/OpenAPI documentation tooling removal
- Scope: Deferred — not adopting
- Implementation state: Deferred

## Origin

Upstream: `chevron7locked/kima-hub` v1.5.0 → v1.6.0, item KH-19.

## What the Upstream Change Does

Removed Swagger/OpenAPI documentation tooling because it only covered ~10% of endpoints and pulled in deprecated transitive dependencies.

## Deferral Reasoning

Soundspan has the opposite approach:
- Active OpenAPI 100% coverage mandate (`npm run openapi-coverage:verify`)
- Swagger setup (`backend/src/config/swagger.ts`) actively maintained
- Integrated with agents-config documentation pipeline
- `typescript-openapi` is an active profile in the governance system

Removing Swagger would directly violate soundspan's documentation governance policy.

## Revisit Criteria

- N/A — Swagger is a maintained and mandated part of soundspan's documentation infrastructure
